aweme_list.desc: New Financial Year, New Rules! Here are 5 important things you NEED to know for the 2025/2026 tax year (starting 6th April 2025) 1️⃣ Self-Assessment Ready? You can file your return from 7th April 2025 — no need to wait till January! Especially useful if you’re applying for a mortgage or trying to access finance. 2️⃣ Fresh Allowances = Fresh Savings! Your ISA allowance resets — save up to £20,000 again with tax-free interest! Your pension annual allowance resets too — you can put away up to £60,000 for retirement, tax-free. Max it out if you can! 3️⃣ Capital Gains Tax Rates Are Up! Selling shares, art, or investments? If you make a profit:  • 18% tax for basic rate taxpayers  • 24% tax for higher rate taxpayers 4️⃣ Buying Property? Know the New Stamp Duty Rates:  • £0–£125k: 0%  • £125k–£250k: 2%  • £250k–£925k: 5% It keeps going up after that — know what you’ll pay before you buy! A bonus rule! … Business Owners, Heads Up! If you have employees, your National Insurance (NI) contributions are going up from 13.8% to 15% — that means a higher employment bill. Plan ahead! The new tax year can be a chance to reset, plan and grow — make the most of it! Got questions? Drop them in the comments — let’s break it down together! #beniratiofinances  • • • • • • • #NewTaxYear #UKFinance #TaxTips #ISASavings #PensionPlanning #CapitalGains #StampDuty #NIincrease #SmallBusinessTips #FinancialGoals #MoneyMadeSimple #PlanSmart #FinanceExplained #moneytalks

aweme_list.desc: UK resident? You need to be maximizing your ISA allowances! An ISA is a tax friendly wrapper that sits around your capital in the UK and shields it from the usual tax treatment. You should be maximizing the full £20,000 ISA contribution allowance each year before turning to alternative investment strategies. A cash ISA (which most inexperienced investors will use) is more than likely a waste of time, and a waste of your allowance. If you're saving money for 3+ years, there is no reason this shouldn't be in a Stocks and Shares ISA/Stocks and Shares Lifetime ISA. Your money must be growing otherwise there is no benefit to the tax efficiency built into your ISA. I've helped many clients convert their cash ISAs to Stocks and Shares (& Lifetime) ISAs and managed their investments whether they're onshore or offshore. If you want my help, drop me a message. #UKResident #ISAAllowances #TaxEfficient #InvestmentStrategies #CashISA #StocksAndSharesISA #LifetimeISA #CapitalGrowth #TaxEfficiency #Investing #FinancialAdvice #WealthManagement #ISASavings #MaximizeAllowance #FinancialGoals #MoneyManagement #SavingsAdvice #FinancialPlanning #InvestmentPortfolio #GrowYourMoney #UKFinance #TaxWrappers #FinancialAdvisor #OffshoreInvestments #AssetManagement #SmartInvesting #MoneyMatters #FuturePlanning #ExpertAdvice
